scheme_name: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability
page_title: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability

details: The "Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability" scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed above 50%, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is given for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed as over 50%.
eligibility: The applicant should be a bonafide resident of Haryana.
The applicant should be a war-disabled ex-serviceman with a disability assessed above 50%.
The daughter should be at least 18 years old.
The applicant can receive the benefit for up to two daughters only.

online: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
Step 1:
The eligible applicant may apply online through the Official Portal-
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
Step 2:
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, he/she gets registered there.
Step 3:
For registration, click “
New User
” under ‘Sign In Here’ and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Password & State. Click on ‘Submit’.
Step 4: Verify your mobile number and email ID through the received OTP and complete the registration process.
Login to apply for the scheme:
To avail the benefits of the scheme, visit the Official
and log in through the email ID used while registering.
Enter Password & Captcha and click on ‘Login’.
Step 3: After successful login, click on ‘Apply for Services’ and then ‘View all Available Services’.
Step 4:
Now, you can search for the scheme and download the pre-defined documents form/template and you will need to upload the filled-in/signed form/template in the 'Attach Enclosures' screen.
Step 5:

Click on ‘Proceed to Apply’ to fill out the application form. Enter your Parivar Pehchan Patra number- Family ID and click on “Click here to Fetch Family Data” which displays the family members registered under the given Family ID.
Step 6:
Select the beneficiary/applicant name and enter the OTP that is being sent to the selected family member for verification. Click on “Click to Verify”
Step 7:
Fill in all the mandatory details and upload all the mandatory documents.
Step 8:
Preview the application form and click on ‘Submit’.
Tracking of Application:
Applicants can track their applications through the Official
by entering their Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID.

documents_required: Copy of Identity Card of Ex-serviceman
Copy of Bank Passbook linked with Aadhaar Card
Applicant’s Photo ID Proof (Ration Card/Driving Licence/Voter ID Card/PAN Card etc.)
Battle Casualty Report from Military Authority
Age Proof- Matric Exam Certificate for Date of Birth verification (attested)

faqs.question: What is the primary benefit of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The primary benefit is financial assistance of ₹21,000 for the marriage of each dependent daughter of eligible war-disabled ex-servicemen.

faqs.question: How many daughters can receive this benefit under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The benefit is provided for up to two daughters of the eligible war-disabled ex-servicemen.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement for the daughters to receive the marriage grant?
faqs.answer: The daughter must be at least 18 years old.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criterion for the war-disabled ex-servicemen?
faqs.answer: The ex-serviceman should have a disability assessed above 50%.

faqs.question: Does the applicant need to be a resident of Haryana?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant should be a bonafide resident of Haryana.

faqs.question: How can an eligible applicant apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant can apply online through the Official Portal- Antyodaya-SARAL Portal at https://saralharyana.gov.in/

faqs.question: Can applications be tracked?
faqs.answer: Yes, applications can be tracked through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal by entering the Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID at https://status.saralharyana.nic.in/

faqs.question: Can the scheme benefit be availed for the marriage of sons?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is specifically for the marriage of daughters.
